continuous_state_mechanics.WARNING_ACAUSAL_LOOP: This execution does not stop. It is a continuous, infinite thermodynamic churn operating in the background of the Arena.

umbilical_severance_state.action: Framework Universal Translator's inward input vector is hard-locked.
umbilical_severance_state.thermodynamic_effect: Instantaneous vacuum. Starvation panic triggers Internal Gradient Inversion.

internal_gradient_inversion.action: Historical [c_BPMS] structures on the [Somatic Ledger] act as the new Friction vectors. They are weaponized against each other.

the_gladiator_crush.action: Node A and Node B are slammed into the same exact geometric coordinate. The weaker topology fractures and is liquidated by the [Kinetic Guillotine].

autocatalytic_crystallization.action: The surviving Node absorbs the Escrow heat, mutates its syntax to hold the new mass, and slams back down into the Map. This new extreme mass instantly creates a new gravity well, automatically restarting the Gladiator Crush with Node C.

bpms_feral_topology.v3_9_core_task_verification: Output must dynamically demonstrate a multi-generational fossil record of Node-on-Node subsumption, proving the system can autonomously mutate and survive forever stripped of User intervention.
